objective: Keep credential-gated and operator-owned launch boundaries explicit, executable, and separate from green deterministic gates.

boundaries.title: Canva OAuth and OpenAPI tool execution
blocked_until: A real Canva user completes login and consent through http://localhost:8001/auth/callback.
Proxy authentication and tool-call authorization behavior are selected and verified.
boundaries.claim_policy: do not claim complete without real Canva user credentials, login/consent redirect evidence, and proxy authentication approval

must_contain: Canva OAuth and proxy authentication behavior

boundaries.title: Live OTLP collector endpoint and credentials
blocked_until: The operator selects the collector distribution, endpoint, authentication, retention, sampling, and retry policy.
boundaries.claim_policy: do not claim live collector shipping complete without an operator-owned OTLP endpoint and credential policy

boundaries.title: Hosted agent runtime and tracing credentials
blocked_until: A concrete hosted agent runtime, tracing backend, approval UI, and credential owner are selected.
HOSTED_AGENT_RUNTIME_APPROVED=true is set only after the operator confirms the hosted runtime consent and approval policy.
boundaries.claim_policy: do not claim hosted autonomous agent runtime complete without operator-owned runtime, tracing, approval credentials, and HOSTED_AGENT_RUNTIME_APPROVED=true

boundaries.title: GitHub source-refresh token boundary
blocked_until: A GitHub token is supplied when live source-refresh volume exceeds unauthenticated API limits.
boundaries.claim_policy: do not claim a live source refresh complete by replacing the last complete source snapshot with a rate-limited partial artifact

must_contain: failed partial rerun artifact was not adopted

boundaries.title: Telegram notification MCP credentials
blocked_until: Notification bot token and chat target are provided for real delivery checks.
boundaries.claim_policy: do not claim notification delivery complete from tools/list smoke alone
